nasb.text: but in everything commending ourselves as servants of God, in much endurance, in afflictions, in hardships, in distresses,

esv.text: but as servants of God we commend ourselves in every way: by great endurance, in afflictions, hardships, calamities,

cnv.text: 反而在各樣的事上，表明自己是　神的僕人，就如持久的忍耐、患難、貧乏、困苦、

ccb.text: 反倒在任何事上都显明自己是上帝的仆人。不论遭遇什么患难、艰苦、贫穷、

csbs.text: 反而在一切事上都证明自己是神的仆人： 在极大的忍耐中，在各种患难、艰难、困苦中，
